title: ShadowCheck — Ivy3737 Disappearance & Fleet Correlation
description: Timeline of Ivy3737 observations near the home marker with the fleet anchor overlaid.

list.name: state
list.label: State
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT region FROM app.wigle_v2_networks_search WHERE ssid ILIKE '%${ssid_pattern}%' AND country = 'US' AND region IS NOT NULL ORDER BY region

options.content:
## Ivy3737 disappearance + fleet overlay

- **Fleet anchor**: coordinated home burst happened on `2025-10-18 20:29:54+00`.
- **Ivy3737 last seen**: `2025-10-29 06:12:12+00`.
- **Interpretation tip**: negative days difference = fleet appeared before Ivy vanished (surveillance). Positive value = fleet came after (equipment removal).

targets.rawSql:
home AS (
  SELECT latitude, longitude
  FROM app.location_markers
  WHERE marker_type = 'home'
  LIMIT 1
),
ivy AS (
  SELECT
    o.time,
    o.bssid,
    COALESCE(e.manufacturer, '') AS manufacturer,
    COALESCE(e.security, '') AS security,
    o.lat,
    o.lon,
    o.level,
    ROUND(
      ST_Distance(
        ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(o.lon, o.lat), 4326)::geography,
        ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(h.longitude, h.latitude), 4326)::geography
      )::numeric,
      1
    ) AS dist_m
  FROM app.observations o
  CROSS JOIN home h
  LEFT JOIN app.api_network_explorer_mv e
    ON UPPER(e.bssid) = UPPER(o.bssid)
  WHERE o.lat IS NOT NULL
    AND o.lon IS NOT NULL
    AND ST_DWithin(
      ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(o.lon, o.lat), 4326)::geography,
      ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(h.longitude, h.latitude), 4326)::geography,
      250
    )
    AND (UPPER(o.bssid) LIKE 'E2:DB:D1:1E:0C:B%' OR UPPER(o.bssid) LIKE 'E2:DB:D1:25:0C:B%')
    AND o.time >= '2024-10-01'
    AND o.time < '2025-11-01'
),
days AS (
  SELECT generate_series(
    (SELECT COALESCE(MIN(date_trunc('day', time)), TIMESTAMPTZ '2024-10-01') FROM ivy),
    (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(date_trunc('day', time)), TIMESTAMPTZ '2025-10-31') FROM ivy),
    INTERVAL '1 day'
  ) AS day
),
ivy_daily AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('day', time) AS day, COUNT(*) AS ivy_obs FROM ivy GROUP BY 1
),
fleet_daily AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', o.time) AS day,
    COUNT(*) AS fleet_obs
  FROM app.observations o
  CROSS JOIN home h
  LEFT JOIN app.api_network_explorer_mv e
    ON UPPER(e.bssid) = UPPER(o.bssid)
  WHERE o.lat IS NOT NULL
    AND o.lon IS NOT NULL
    AND ST_DWithin(
      ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(o.lon, o.lat), 4326)::geography,
      ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(h.longitude, h.latitude), 4326)::geography,
      250
    )
    AND ((
  COALESCE(e.manufacturer,'') ILIKE '%Sierra Wireless%'
  OR COALESCE(e.manufacturer,'') ILIKE '%Air Link%'
  OR COALESCE(e.manufacturer,'') ILIKE '%Wnc%'
  OR COALESCE(e.manufacturer,'') ILIKE '%Aumovio%'
  OR COALESCE(e.manufacturer,'') ILIKE '%Lg Innotek%'
  OR COALESCE(e.ssid,'') ILIKE 'Hotspot%'
  OR COALESCE(e.ssid,'') ILIKE 'hum%'
  OR COALESCE(e.ssid,'') ILIKE 'myGMC%'
))
    AND o.time >= (SELECT MIN(time) FROM ivy)
    AND o.time <= (SELECT MAX(time) FROM ivy)
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  day AS "time",
  COALESCE(i.ivy_obs, 0) AS "Ivy obs",
  COALESCE(f.fleet_obs, 0) AS "Home fleet obs"
FROM days d
LEFT JOIN ivy_daily i ON i.day = d.day
LEFT JOIN fleet_daily f ON f.day = d.day
ORDER BY 1

home AS (
  SELECT latitude, longitude
  FROM app.location_markers
  WHERE marker_type = 'home'
  LIMIT 1
),
ivy AS (
  SELECT
    o.time,
    o.bssid,
    COALESCE(e.manufacturer, '') AS manufacturer,
    COALESCE(e.security, '') AS security,
    o.lat,
    o.lon,
    o.level,
    ROUND(
      ST_Distance(
        ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(o.lon, o.lat), 4326)::geography,
        ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(h.longitude, h.latitude), 4326)::geography
      )::numeric,
      1
    ) AS dist_m
  FROM app.observations o
  CROSS JOIN home h
  LEFT JOIN app.api_network_explorer_mv e
    ON UPPER(e.bssid) = UPPER(o.bssid)
  WHERE o.lat IS NOT NULL
    AND o.lon IS NOT NULL
    AND ST_DWithin(
      ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(o.lon, o.lat), 4326)::geography,
      ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(h.longitude, h.latitude), 4326)::geography,
      250
    )
    AND (UPPER(o.bssid) LIKE 'E2:DB:D1:1E:0C:B%' OR UPPER(o.bssid) LIKE 'E2:DB:D1:25:0C:B%')
    AND o.time >= '2024-10-01'
    AND o.time < '2025-11-01'
)
SELECT
  bssid AS "BSSID",
  COALESCE(manufacturer, 'unknown') AS "Manufacturer",
  security AS "Security",
  MIN(time) AS "First seen",
  MAX(time) AS "Last seen",
  COUNT(*) AS "Observations",
  ROUND(AVG(level)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg signal (dBm)",
  ROUND(MIN(dist_m)::numeric, 1) AS "Closest to home (m)"
FROM ivy
GROUP BY bssid, manufacturer, security
ORDER BY MAX(time) DESC

home AS (
  SELECT latitude, longitude
  FROM app.location_markers
  WHERE marker_type = 'home'
  LIMIT 1
),
ivy AS (
  SELECT
    o.time,
    o.bssid,
    COALESCE(e.manufacturer, '') AS manufacturer,
    COALESCE(e.security, '') AS security,
    o.lat,
    o.lon,
    o.level,
    ROUND(
      ST_Distance(
        ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(o.lon, o.lat), 4326)::geography,
        ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(h.longitude, h.latitude), 4326)::geography
      )::numeric,
      1
    ) AS dist_m
  FROM app.observations o
  CROSS JOIN home h
  LEFT JOIN app.api_network_explorer_mv e
    ON UPPER(e.bssid) = UPPER(o.bssid)
  WHERE o.lat IS NOT NULL
    AND o.lon IS NOT NULL
    AND ST_DWithin(
      ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(o.lon, o.lat), 4326)::geography,
      ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(h.longitude, h.latitude), 4326)::geography,
      250
    )
    AND (UPPER(o.bssid) LIKE 'E2:DB:D1:1E:0C:B%' OR UPPER(o.bssid) LIKE 'E2:DB:D1:25:0C:B%')
    AND o.time >= '2024-10-01'
    AND o.time < '2025-11-01'
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bssid) AS "Unique Ivy BSSIDs" FROM ivy

home AS (
  SELECT latitude, longitude
  FROM app.location_markers
  WHERE marker_type = 'home'
  LIMIT 1
),
ivy AS (
  SELECT
    o.time,
    o.bssid,
    COALESCE(e.manufacturer, '') AS manufacturer,
    COALESCE(e.security, '') AS security,
    o.lat,
    o.lon,
    o.level,
    ROUND(
      ST_Distance(
        ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(o.lon, o.lat), 4326)::geography,
        ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(h.longitude, h.latitude), 4326)::geography
      )::numeric,
      1
    ) AS dist_m
  FROM app.observations o
  CROSS JOIN home h
  LEFT JOIN app.api_network_explorer_mv e
    ON UPPER(e.bssid) = UPPER(o.bssid)
  WHERE o.lat IS NOT NULL
    AND o.lon IS NOT NULL
    AND ST_DWithin(
      ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(o.lon, o.lat), 4326)::geography,
      ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(h.longitude, h.latitude), 4326)::geography,
      250
    )
    AND (UPPER(o.bssid) LIKE 'E2:DB:D1:1E:0C:B%' OR UPPER(o.bssid) LIKE 'E2:DB:D1:25:0C:B%')
    AND o.time >= '2024-10-01'
    AND o.time < '2025-11-01'
)
WITH ivy_span AS (
  SELECT MAX(time) AS last_seen FROM ivy
)
SELECT
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (TIMESTAMPTZ '2025-10-18 20:29:54+00' - last_seen)) / 86400::numeric, 2) AS "Days difference"
FROM ivy_span

options.content: Negative difference: the fleet appeared before Ivy vanished (surveillance). Positive difference: fleet arrived after Ivy stopped broadcasting (removal/redeployment).

list.name: Fleet burst
list.query: SELECT TIMESTAMPTZ '2025-10-18 20:29:54+00' AS time, 'Coordinated fleet at home' AS text

list.name: Ivy last seen
list.query: SELECT TIMESTAMPTZ '2025-10-29 06:12:12+00' AS time, 'Ivy3737 final observation' AS text
